scadenzeOspitante.citazione: Nomination deadline: April 15 for the winter semester. October 15 for the summer semester. Application deadlines: May 15 for the winter semester.

linkCatalogo.citazione: The courses offered in the coming semester will be published approx. 10 weeks before the start of the semester on unisono.

requisitoLingua.citazione: Exchange students whose primary language is not English must meet level B1 requirements for English proficiency

linkCatalogo.citazione: Study plans can be prepared using the list of courses offered for exchange students.
List of courses taught in English at all Faculties of the University of Rzeszów
